name: baseline_v51_20m
description: v5.1 baseline: 20M iteration CFR+ with 120 buckets (8 equity x 15 hand types), position encoding, fixed postflop pot + preflop fold + blind tracking

exploitability.note: Monte Carlo BR with 500 samples, 3 seeds, CV ~2%

bugs_fixed_since_v5: Postflop zero-pot: inv=[0,0] made all bets zero, postflop never learned. Fix: inv=[0.5,0.5]
Preflop fold missing: SB could not fold vs BB. Fix: has_bet_to_call=True for preflop root
Blind tracking: SB/BB investments were [0.5,0.5] not [0.5,1.0]. Fix: correct blind model

strategy_quality.preflop_oop: Fold 72-95% low equity, limp 99% mid equity, raise/shove mix at high equity
strategy_quality.preflop_ip_vs_raise: 99% fold low EQ, 98-99% call mid EQ, heavy 3bet/all-in at EQ 7
strategy_quality.flop_oop: Check 61-66% weak, 99% check mid, thin value bet strong, trap/shove nuts
